long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between bcs285b.sr01.dal12 Et50/1 <-> bas26b.sr01.dal12 Et4/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19746
short_description: bcs285b.sr01.dal12 Et50/1 <-> bas26b.sr01.dal12 Et4/1 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
